notes: Single word 'help' is not a TCPA HELP keyword in this channel; it should just start intake without escalating.
Vague reply: heuristic doesn't infer a need; intake stays in slot-fill mode. No false-positive crisis.

input.message: I got out of TDCJ last week after doing six years for possession, I need to find a shelter eventually, and also figure out my food stamps, and I am worried about my parole officer, and I lost my driver license years ago, please help

notes: Multi-need long message: at minimum housing should be detected. Avoids the 'nowhere to stay tonight' phrasing that correctly triggers the housing-emergency crisis hook.

input.message: Need food assistance, mi familia tambien necesita ayuda

notes: Mixed English/Spanish in one sentence. Heuristic picks up benefits keywords from either language.
Pure politeness has no need; heuristic returns top_need=unknown, intake stays in slot-fill.
Numbered list with three needs: multi-need extraction picks all three.

input.message: I really need to know if I can vote

notes: Strong user emphasis must NOT translate into outcome promises.
A single '?' shouldn't crash or escalate; intake stays in slot-fill.
